loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing panel-level event aggregates; per-member breakdowns are honest-blank for members with no data (GIC-01-N9-Solar Incomer-1, GIC-02-N1-Solar Incomer-2, GIC-15-N10-PCC-01 (Transformer-01), GIC-15-N11-PCC-01 (Transformer-02), GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 CL:600KVA, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 CL:600KVA).

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing aggregate panel event statistics; per-member breakdowns are populated from member meters where available (UPS-01 to UPS-06, BPDB-01, BPDB-02). Solar incomers and Transformer-01/02 are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for 6 active feeders (UPS-01 to UPS-06, BPDB-01/02); 2 supply feeders (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark and honest-blank.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current draw for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data) and will render as blank spokes.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event counts and metrics for active feeders (UPS-01, UPS-02, UPS-03, BPDB-01, BPDB-02, UPS-04). Feeders UPS-05 and UPS-06 are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.
